title: vignea oreophila
intro: Vignea oreophila, also known as the mountain tea plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Philippines. The leaves of the Vignea oreophila plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and acting as an antacid. Vignea oreophila can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water or as a tincture by extracting the active compounds using a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
